verses.latin_vulgate: Et hæc sunt verba libri quem misit Jeremias propheta de Jerusalem ad reliquias seniorum transmigrationis, et ad sacerdotes, et ad prophetas, et ad omnem populum quem traduxerat Nabuchodonosor de Jerusalem in Babylonem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֙לֶּה֙ דִּבְרֵ֣י הַסֵּ֔פֶר אֲשֶׁ֥ר שָׁלַ֛ח יִרְמְיָ֥ה הַנָּבִ֖יא מִירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם אֶל־יֶ֜תֶר זִקְנֵ֣י הַגּוֹלָ֗ה וְאֶל־הַכֹּהֲנִ֤ים וְאֶל־הַנְּבִיאִים֙ וְאֶל־כׇּל־הָעָ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֨ר הֶגְלָ֧ה נְבוּכַדְנֶאצַּ֛ר מִירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם בָּבֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now these are the words of the letter which Jeremiah the prophet sent from Jerusalem to the residue of the ancients that were carried into captivity, and to the priests, and to the prophets, and to all the people, whom Nabuchodonosor had carried away from Jerusalem to Babylon:
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat kirjoituksen sanat, jotka Jeremia propheta lähetti Jerusalemista jääneille vanhimmille, jotka olivat viedyt pois, ja papeille, ja prophetaille ja kaikelle kansalle, jotka Nebukadnetsar oli vienyt Jerusalemista Babeliin,
verses.king_james: Now these are the words of the letter that Jeremiah the prophet sent from Jerusalem unto the residue of the elders which were carried away captives, and to the priests, and to the prophets, and to all the people whom Nebuchadnezzar had carried away captive from Jerusalem to Babylon;

verses.latin_vulgate: postquam egressus est Jechonias rex, et domina, et eunuchi, et principes Juda et Jerusalem, et faber et inclusor, de Jerusalem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַחֲרֵ֣י צֵ֣את יְכׇנְיָֽה־הַ֠מֶּ֠לֶךְ וְהַגְּבִירָ֨ה וְהַסָּרִיסִ֜ים שָׂרֵ֨י יְהוּדָ֧ה וִירוּשָׁלַ֛͏ִם וְהֶחָרָ֥שׁ וְהַמַּסְגֵּ֖ר מִירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: After that Jechonias the king, and the queen, and the eunuchs, and the princes of Juda, and of Jerusalem, and the craftsmen, and the engravers were departed out of Jerusalem:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sittekuin kuningas Jekonia ja kuningatar, kamaripalveliat, ja Juudan ja Jerusalemin päämiehet sekä puuseppäin ja seppäin kanssa olivat pois Jerusalemista,
verses.king_james: (After that Jeconiah the king, and the queen, and the eunuchs, the princes of Judah and Jerusalem, and the carpenters, and the smiths, were departed from Jerusalem;)

verses.latin_vulgate: in manu Elasa filii Saphan, et Gamariæ filii Helciæ, quos misit Sedecias rex Juda ad Nabuchodonosor regem Babylonis in Babylonem, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּיַד֙ אֶלְעָשָׂ֣ה בֶן־שָׁפָ֔ן וּגְמַרְיָ֖ה בֶּן־חִלְקִיָּ֑ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר שָׁלַ֜ח צִדְקִיָּ֣ה מֶלֶךְ־יְהוּדָ֗ה אֶל־נְבוּכַדְנֶאצַּ֛ר מֶ֥לֶךְ בָּבֶ֖ל בָּבֶ֥לָה לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: By the hand of Elasa the son of Saphan, and Gamarias the son of Helcias, whom Sedecias king of Juda sent to Babylon to Nabuchodonosor king of Babylon, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Elasan Saphanin pojan ja Gemarjan Hilkian pojan kautta, jotka Juudan kuningas Zedekia lähetti Nebukadnetsarin, Babelin kuninkaan, tykö Babeliin; sanoen:
verses.king_james: By the hand of Elasah the son of Shaphan, and Gemariah the son of Hilkiah, (whom Zedekiah king of Judah sent unto Babylon to Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon) saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum, Deus Israël, omni transmigrationi quam transtuli de Jerusalem in Babylonem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֥ה אָמַ֛ר יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל לְכׇ֨ל־הַגּוֹלָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־הִגְלֵ֥יתִי מִירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם בָּבֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord of hosts the God of Israel, to all that are carried away captives, whom I have caused to be carried away from Jerusalem to Babylon:
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin sanoo Herra Zebaot, Israelin Jumala, kaikille vangeille, jotka minä olen antanut viedä pois Jerusalemista Babeliin:
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, unto all that are carried away captives, whom I have caused to be carried away from Jerusalem unto Babylon;

verses.latin_vulgate: Ædificate domos, et habitate : et plantate hortos, et comedite fructum eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנ֥וּ בָתִּ֖ים וְשֵׁ֑בוּ וְנִטְע֣וּ גַנּ֔וֹת וְאִכְל֖וּ אֶת־פִּרְיָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Build ye houses, and dwell in them: and plant orchards, and eat the fruit of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Rakentakaat huoneita, joissa te taidatte asua, istuttakaat puutarhoja, joissa te saisitte syödä hedelmiä.
verses.king_james: Build ye houses, and dwell in them; and plant gardens, and eat the fruit of them;

verses.latin_vulgate: Accipite uxores, et generate filios et filias : et date filiis vestris uxores, et filias vestras date viris, et pariant filios et filias : et multiplicamini ibi, et nolite esse pauci numero.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קְח֣וּ נָשִׁ֗ים וְהוֹלִ֘ידוּ֮ בָּנִ֣ים וּבָנוֹת֒ וּקְח֨וּ לִבְנֵיכֶ֜ם נָשִׁ֗ים וְאֶת־בְּנֽוֹתֵיכֶם֙ תְּנ֣וּ לַאֲנָשִׁ֔ים וְתֵלַ֖דְנָה בָּנִ֣ים וּבָנ֑וֹת וּרְבוּ־שָׁ֖ם וְאַל־תִּמְעָֽטוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Take ye wives, and beget sons and daughters: and take wives for your sons, and give your daughters to husbands, and let them bear sons and daughters: and be ye multiplied there, and be not few in number.
verses.finnish_biblia: Naikaat emäntiä, ja siittäkäät poikia ja tyttäriä, ja antakaat pojillenne emäntiä, ja naittakaat tyttärenne miehille, että he synnyttäisivät poikia ja tyttäriä; enentäkäät itsiänne siellä, ettette vähenisi.
verses.king_james: Take ye wives, and beget sons and daughters; and take wives for your sons, and give your daughters to husbands, that they may bear sons and daughters; that ye may be increased there, and not diminished.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et quærite pacem civitatis ad quam transmigrare vos feci, et orate pro ea ad Dominum, quia in pace illius erit pax vobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדִרְשׁ֞וּ אֶת־שְׁל֣וֹם הָעִ֗יר אֲשֶׁ֨ר הִגְלֵ֤יתִי אֶתְכֶם֙ שָׁ֔מָּה וְהִתְפַּֽלְל֥וּ בַעֲדָ֖הּ אֶל־יְהֹוָ֑ה כִּ֣י בִשְׁלוֹמָ֔הּ יִהְיֶ֥ה לָכֶ֖ם שָׁלֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And seek the peace of the city, to which I have caused you to be carried away captives; and pray to the Lord for it: for in the peace thereof shall be your peace.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katsokaat sen kaupungin parasta, johonka minä olen teitä antanut vietää, ja rukoilkaat sen edestä Herraa; sillä kuin se menestyy, niin myös te menestytte.
verses.king_james: And seek the peace of the city whither I have caused you to be carried away captives, and pray unto the Lord for it: for in the peace thereof shall ye have peace.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc enim dicit Dominus exercituum, Deus Israël : Non vos seducant prophetæ vestri qui sunt in medio vestrum, et divini vestri, et ne attendatis ad somnia vestra quæ vos somniatis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי֩ כֹ֨ה אָמַ֜ר יְהֹוָ֤ה צְבָאוֹת֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אַל־יַשִּׁ֧יאוּ לָכֶ֛ם נְבִיאֵיכֶ֥ם אֲשֶׁר־בְּקִרְבְּכֶ֖ם וְקֹסְמֵיכֶ֑ם וְאַֽל־תִּשְׁמְעוּ֙ אֶל־חֲלֹמֹ֣תֵיכֶ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר אַתֶּ֖ם מַחְלְמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thus saith the Lord of hosts the God of Israel: Let not your prophets that are in the midst of you, and your diviners deceive you: and give no heed to your dreams which you dream:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä näin sanoo Herra Zebaot, Israelin Jumala: älkäät antako prophetainne, jotka teidän tykönänne ovat, ja tietäjänne pettää teitä, ja älkäät totelko unianne, joita te unissanne näette.
verses.king_james: For thus saith the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel; Let not your prophets and your diviners, that be in the midst of you, deceive you, neither hearken to your dreams which ye cause to be dreamed.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia falso ipsi prophetant vobis in nomine meo, et non misi eos, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י בְשֶׁ֔קֶר הֵ֛ם נִבְּאִ֥ים לָכֶ֖ם בִּשְׁמִ֑י לֹ֥א שְׁלַחְתִּ֖ים נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: For they prophesy falsely to you in my name: and I have not sent them, saith the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä he ennustavat teille valhetta minun nimeeni: en minä ole heitä lähettänyt, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: For they prophesy falsely unto you in my name: I have not sent them, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia hæc dicit Dominus : Cum cœperint impleri in Babylone septuaginta anni, visitabo vos, et suscitabo super vos verbum meum bonum, ut reducam vos ad locum istum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־כֹה֙ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה כִּ֠י לְפִ֞י מְלֹ֧את לְבָבֶ֛ל שִׁבְעִ֥ים שָׁנָ֖ה אֶפְקֹ֣ד אֶתְכֶ֑ם וַהֲקִמֹתִ֤י עֲלֵיכֶם֙ אֶת־דְּבָרִ֣י הַטּ֔וֹב לְהָשִׁ֣יב אֶתְכֶ֔ם אֶל־הַמָּק֖וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thus saith the Lord: When the seventy years shall begin to be accomplished in Babylon, I will visit you: and I will perform my good word in your favour, to bring you again to this place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä näin sanoo Herra: kuin Babelissa seitsemänkymmentä vuotta ovat kuluneet, niin minä tahdon etsiä teitä, ja herättää armollisen sanani teidän päällenne, niin että minä tahdon antaa teidän tulla tähän paikkaan jällensä.
verses.king_james: For thus saith the Lord, That after seventy years be accomplished at Babylon I will visit you, and perform my good word toward you, in causing you to return to this place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego enim scio cogitationes quas ego cogito super vos, ait Dominus, cogitationes pacis et non afflictionis, ut dem vobis finem et patientiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי֩ אָנֹכִ֨י יָדַ֜עְתִּי אֶת־הַמַּחֲשָׁבֹ֗ת אֲשֶׁ֧ר אָנֹכִ֛י חֹשֵׁ֥ב עֲלֵיכֶ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה מַחְשְׁב֤וֹת שָׁלוֹם֙ וְלֹ֣א לְרָעָ֔ה לָתֵ֥ת לָכֶ֖ם אַחֲרִ֥ית וְתִקְוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I know the thoughts that I think towards you, saith the Lord, thoughts of peace, and not of affliction, to give you an end and patience.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä kyllä tiedän, mitkä teistä minun ajatukseni ovat, sanoo Herra: rauhan ja ei murheen ajatukset; että minä olen antava teille sen lopun, jonka te toivotte.
verses.king_james: For I know the thoughts that I think toward you, saith the Lord, thoughts of peace, and not of evil, to give you an expected end.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et invocabitis me, et ibitis : et orabitis me, et ego exaudiam vos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּקְרָאתֶ֤ם אֹתִי֙ וַֽהֲלַכְתֶּ֔ם וְהִתְפַּלַּלְתֶּ֖ם אֵלָ֑י וְשָׁמַעְתִּ֖י אֲלֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And you shall call upon me, and you shall go. and you shall pray to me, and I will hear you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teidän pitää minua rukoileman, käymän ja anoman minulta, ja minä kuulen teitä.
verses.king_james: Then shall ye call upon me, and ye shall go and pray unto me, and I will hearken unto you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quæretis me, et invenietis, cum quæsieritis me in toto corde vestro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבִקַּשְׁתֶּ֥ם אֹתִ֖י וּמְצָאתֶ֑ם כִּ֥י תִדְרְשֻׁ֖נִי בְּכׇל־לְבַבְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: You shall seek me, and shall find me: when you shall seek me with all your heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Teidän pitää etsimän minua ja löytämän minun: sillä jos te etsitte minua kaikesta sydämestänne,
verses.king_james: And ye shall seek me, and find me, when ye shall search for me with all your heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et inveniar a vobis, ait Dominus : et reducam captivitatem vestram, et congregabo vos de universis gentibus et de cunctis locis ad quæ expuli vos, dicit Dominus, et reverti vos faciam de loco ad quem transmigrare vos feci.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנִמְצֵ֣אתִי לָכֶם֮ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָה֒ וְשַׁבְתִּ֣י אֶת־[שְׁבוּתְכֶ֗ם] (שביתכם) וְקִבַּצְתִּ֣י אֶ֠תְכֶ֠ם מִֽכׇּל־הַגּוֹיִ֞ם וּמִכׇּל־הַמְּקוֹמ֗וֹת אֲשֶׁ֨ר הִדַּ֧חְתִּי אֶתְכֶ֛ם שָׁ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה וַהֲשִׁבֹתִ֣י אֶתְכֶ֔ם אֶ֨ל־הַמָּק֔וֹם אֲשֶׁר־הִגְלֵ֥יתִי אֶתְכֶ֖ם מִשָּֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will be found by you, saith the Lord: and I will bring back your captivity, and I will gather you out of all nations, and from all the places to which I have driven you out, saith the Lord: and I will bring you back from the place to which I caused you to be carried away captive.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä tahdon antaa itseni löytää teiltä, sanoo Herra, ja kääntää teidän vankiutenne, ja koota teidän kaikesta kansasta ja kaikista paikoista, joihin minä teidät ajanut olin, sanoo Herra; ja tahdon antaa teidän tulla jällensä tähän paikkaan, josta minä olen antanut viedä teitä pois.
verses.king_james: And I will be found of you, saith the Lord: and I will turn away your captivity, and I will gather you from all the nations, and from all the places whither I have driven you, saith the Lord; and I will bring you again into the place whence I caused you to be carried away captive.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia dixistis : Suscitavit nobis Dominus prophetas in Babylone :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֖י אֲמַרְתֶּ֑ם הֵקִ֨ים לָ֧נוּ יְהֹוָ֛ה נְבִאִ֖ים בָּבֶֽלָה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Because you have said: The Lord hath raised us up prophets in Babylon:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta jos te ajattelette: Herra on herättänyt meille prophetaita Babelissa;
verses.king_james: Because ye have said, The Lord hath raised us up prophets in Babylon;

verses.latin_vulgate: quia hæc dicit Dominus ad regem qui sedet super solium David, et ad omnem populum habitatorem urbis hujus, ad fratres vestros qui non sunt egressi vobiscum in transmigrationem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־כֹ֣ה ׀ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה אֶל־הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ הַיּוֹשֵׁב֙ אֶל־כִּסֵּ֣א דָוִ֔ד וְאֶ֨ל־כׇּל־הָעָ֔ם הַיּוֹשֵׁ֖ב בָּעִ֣יר הַזֹּ֑את אֲחֵיכֶ֕ם אֲשֶׁ֛ר לֹֽא־יָצְא֥וּ אִתְּכֶ֖ם בַּגּוֹלָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: For thus saith the Lord to the king that sitteth upon the throne of David, and to all the people that dwell in this city, to your brethren that are not gone forth with you into captivity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoo Herra näin siitä kuninkaasta, joka istuu Davidin istuimella, ja kaikesta kansasta, joka tässä kaupungissa asuu, teidän veljistänne, jotka ei teidän kanssanne lähteneet vankiuteen,
verses.king_james: Know that thus saith the Lord of the king that sitteth upon the throne of David, and of all the people that dwelleth in this city, and of your brethren that are not gone forth with you into captivity;

verses.latin_vulgate: hæc dicit Dominus exercituum : Ecce mittam in eos gladium, et famem, et pestem : et ponam eos quasi ficus malas, quæ comedi non possunt eo quod pessimæ sint :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת הִנְנִי֙ מְשַׁלֵּ֣חַ בָּ֔ם אֶת־הַחֶ֖רֶב אֶת־הָרָעָ֣ב וְאֶת־הַדָּ֑בֶר וְנָתַתִּ֣י אוֹתָ֗ם כַּתְּאֵנִים֙ הַשֹּׁ֣עָרִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־תֵאָכַ֖לְנָה מֵרֹֽעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord of hosts: Behold I will send upon them the sword, and the famine, and the pestilence: and I will make them like bad figs that cannot be eaten, because they are very bad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin tosin sanoo Herra Zebaot: katso, minä lähetän heidän sekaansa miekan, nälän ja ruton, ja teen heille niinkuin pahoille fikunoille, joita ei syödä taideta, että ne niin pahat ovat.
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord of hosts; Behold, I will send upon them the sword, the famine, and the pestilence, and will make them like vile figs, that cannot be eaten, they are so evil.

verses.latin_vulgate: et persequar eos in gladio, et in fame, et in pestilentia : et dabo eos in vexationem universis regnis terræ : in maledictionem, et in stuporem, et in sibilum, et in opprobrium cunctis gentibus ad quas ego ejeci eos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָֽדַפְתִּי֙ אַֽחֲרֵיהֶ֔ם בַּחֶ֖רֶב בָּרָעָ֣ב וּבַדָּ֑בֶר וּנְתַתִּ֨ים (לזועה) [לְזַעֲוָ֜ה] לְכֹ֣ל ׀ מַמְלְכ֣וֹת הָאָ֗רֶץ לְאָלָ֤ה וּלְשַׁמָּה֙ וְלִשְׁרֵקָ֣ה וּלְחֶרְפָּ֔ה בְּכׇל־הַגּוֹיִ֖ם אֲשֶׁר־הִדַּחְתִּ֥ים שָֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will persecute them with the sword, and with famine, and with the pestilence: and I will give them up unto affliction to all the kingdoms of the earth: to be a curse, and an astonishment, and a hissing, and a reproach to all the nations to which I have driven them out:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vainoon heitä miekalla, nälällä ja rutolla, ja panen heidät kulkiaksi kaikissa valtakunnissa maan päällä, että heidän pitää tuleman kiroukseksi, ihmeeksi, häväistykseksi ja pilkaksi kaikkein kansain seassa, kuhunka minä heidät ajava olen;
verses.king_james: And I will persecute them with the sword, with the famine, and with the pestilence, and will deliver them to be removed to all the kingdoms of the earth, to be a curse, and an astonishment, and an hissing, and a reproach, among all the nations whither I have driven them:

verses.latin_vulgate: eo quod non audierint verba mea, dicit Dominus, quæ misit ad eos per servos meos prophetas, de nocte consurgens et mittens : et non audistis, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּ֛חַת אֲשֶֽׁר־לֹא־שָׁמְע֥וּ אֶל־דְּבָרַ֖י נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה אֲשֶׁר֩ שָׁלַ֨חְתִּי אֲלֵיהֶ֜ם אֶת־עֲבָדַ֤י הַנְּבִאִים֙ הַשְׁכֵּ֣ם וְשָׁלֹ֔חַ וְלֹ֥א שְׁמַעְתֶּ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because they have not hearkened to my words, saith the Lord: which I sent to them by my servants the prophets, rising by night, and sending: and you have not heard, saith the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettei he kuulleet minun sanojani, sanoo Herra, joita minä varhain minun palveliaini prophetain kanssa heille lähettänyt olen; mutta ette tahtoneet kuulla, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: Because they have not hearkened to my words, saith the Lord, which I sent unto them by my servants the prophets, rising up early and sending them; but ye would not hear, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vos ergo audite verbum Domini, omnis transmigratio quam emisi de Jerusalem in Babylonem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתֶּ֖ם שִׁמְע֣וּ דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֑ה כׇּ֨ל־הַגּוֹלָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־שִׁלַּ֥חְתִּי מִירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם בָּבֶֽלָה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Hear ye therefore the word of the Lord, all ye of the captivity, whom I have sent out from Jerusalem to Babylon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta te kaikki, jotka vangittuina olette viedyt pois, jotka minä olen Jerusalemista antanut mennä Babeliin, kuulkaat Herran sanaa:
verses.king_james: Hear ye therefore the word of the Lord, all ye of the captivity, whom I have sent from Jerusalem to Babylon:

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum, Deus Israël, ad Achab filium Coliæ, et ad Sedeciam filium Maasiæ, qui prophetant vobis in nomine meo mendaciter : Ecce ego tradam eos in manus Nabuchodonosor regis Babylonis, et percutiet eos in oculis vestris :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּֽה־אָמַר֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה צְבָא֜וֹת אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל אֶל־אַחְאָ֤ב בֶּן־קֽוֹלָיָה֙ וְאֶל־צִדְקִיָּ֣הוּ בֶן־מַֽעֲשֵׂיָ֔ה הַֽנִּבְּאִ֥ים לָכֶ֛ם בִּשְׁמִ֖י שָׁ֑קֶר הִנְנִ֣י ׀ נֹתֵ֣ן אֹתָ֗ם בְּיַד֙ נְבֽוּכַדְרֶאצַּ֣ר מֶֽלֶךְ־בָּבֶ֔ל וְהִכָּ֖ם לְעֵינֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord of hosts the God of Israel, to Achab the son of Colias, and to Sedecias the son of Maasias, who prophesy unto you in my name falsely: Behold I will deliver them up into the hands of Nabuchodonosor the king of Babylon: and he shall kill them before your eyes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin sanoo Herra Zebaot, Israelin Jumala, Ahabia Kolajan poikaa ja Zedekiaa Maasejan poikaa vastaan, jotka teille minun nimeeni valhetta ennustavat: katso, minä annan heidät Nebukadnetsarin, Babelin kuninkaan, käsiin, hänen pitää antaman heitä lyödä teidän silmäinne edessä.
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, of Ahab the son of Kolaiah, and of Zedekiah the son of Maaseiah, which prophesy a lie unto you in my name; Behold, I will deliver them into the hand of Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon; and he shall slay them before your eyes;

verses.latin_vulgate: et assumetur ex eis maledictio omni transmigrationi Juda quæ est in Babylone, dicentium : Ponat te Dominus sicut Sedeciam et sicut Achab, quos frixit rex Babylonis in igne :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֻקַּ֤ח מֵהֶם֙ קְלָלָ֔ה לְכֹל֙ גָּל֣וּת יְהוּדָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר בְּבָבֶ֖ל לֵאמֹ֑ר יְשִֽׂמְךָ֤ יְהֹוָה֙ כְּצִדְקִיָּ֣הוּ וּכְאֶחָ֔ב אֲשֶׁר־קָלָ֥ם מֶֽלֶךְ־בָּבֶ֖ל בָּאֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And of them shall be taken up a curse by all the captivity of Juda, that are in Babylon, saying: The Lord make thee like Sedecias, and like Achab, whom the king of Babylon fried in the fire:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heitä pitää sadateltaman kaikkein Juudan vankein seassa, jotka ovat Babelissa, ja sanottaman: Herra tehköön sinulle niinkuin Zedekialle ja Ahabille, jotka Babelin kuningas antoi tulessa paistaa:
verses.king_james: And of them shall be taken up a curse by all the captivity of Judah which are in Babylon, saying, The Lord make thee like Zedekiah and like Ahab, whom the king of Babylon roasted in the fire;

verses.latin_vulgate: pro eo quod fecerint stultitiam in Israël, et mœchati sunt in uxores amicorum suorum, et locuti sunt verbum in nomine meo mendaciter, quod non mandavi eis. Ego sum judex et testis, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַ֡עַן אֲשֶׁר֩ עָשׂ֨וּ נְבָלָ֜ה בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל וַיְנַֽאֲפוּ֙ אֶת־נְשֵׁ֣י רֵֽעֵיהֶ֔ם וַיְדַבְּר֨וּ דָבָ֤ר בִּשְׁמִי֙ שֶׁ֔קֶר אֲשֶׁ֖ר ל֣וֹא צִוִּיתִ֑ם וְאָנֹכִ֛י (הוידע) [הַיּוֹדֵ֥עַ] וָעֵ֖ד נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Because they have acted folly in Israel, and have committed adultery with the wives of their friends, and have spoken lying words in my name, which I commanded them not: I am the judge and the witness, saith the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että he tekivät hulluuden Israelissa, ja makasivat muiden emäntiä, ja saarnasivat valhetta minun nimeeni, jota en minä ollut heille käskenyt. Ja minä sen tiedän ja todistan, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: Because they have committed villany in Israel, and have committed adultery with their neighbours’ wives, and have spoken lying words in my name, which I have not commanded them; even I know, and am a witness, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ad Semeiam Nehelamiten dices :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶל־שְׁמַעְיָ֥הוּ הַנֶּחֱלָמִ֖י תֹּאמַ֥ר לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to Semeias the Nehelamite thou shalt say:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Semajaa vastaan Nehalamista pitää sinun puhuman, sanoen:
verses.king_james: Thus shalt thou also speak to Shemaiah the Nehelamite, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum, Deus Israël : Pro eo quod misisti in nomine tuo libros ad omnem populum qui est in Jerusalem, et ad Sophoniam filium Maasiæ sacerdotem, et ad universos sacerdotes, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּֽה־אָמַ֞ר יְהֹוָ֧ה צְבָא֛וֹת אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לֵאמֹ֑ר יַ֡עַן אֲשֶׁ֣ר אַתָּה֩ שָׁלַ֨חְתָּ בְשִׁמְכָ֜ה סְפָרִ֗ים אֶל־כׇּל־הָעָם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בִּירוּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם וְאֶל־צְפַנְיָ֤ה בֶן־מַֽעֲשֵׂיָה֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְאֶ֥ל כׇּל־הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord of hosts the God of Israel: Because thou hast sent letters in thy name to all the people that are in Jerusalem, and to Sophonias the son of Maasias the priest, and to all the priests, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin puhuu Herra Zebaot, Israelin Jumala, sanoen: että sinä sinun nimelläs olet lähettänyt kirjoituksen kaikelle kansalle, joka on Jerusalemissa, ja papille Zephanialle Maasejan pojalle, ja kaikille papeille, ja sanonut:
verses.king_james: Thus speaketh the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, saying, Because thou hast sent letters in thy name unto all the people that are at Jerusalem, and to Zephaniah the son of Maaseiah the priest, and to all the priests, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus dedit te sacerdotem pro Jojade sacerdote, ut sis dux in domo Domini, super omnem virum arreptitium et prophetantem, ut mittas eum in nervum et in carcerem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֞ה נְתָנְךָ֣ כֹהֵ֗ן תַּ֚חַת יְהוֹיָדָ֣ע הַכֹּהֵ֔ן לִֽהְי֤וֹת פְּקִדִים֙ בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֔ה לְכׇל־אִ֥ישׁ מְשֻׁגָּ֖ע וּמִתְנַבֵּ֑א וְנָתַתָּ֥ה אֹת֛וֹ אֶל־הַמַּהְפֶּ֖כֶת וְאֶל־הַצִּינֹֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord hath made thee priest instead of Joiada the priest, that thou shouldst be ruler in the house of the Lord, over every man that raveth and prophesieth, to put him in the stocks, and into prison.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra on asettanut sinun papiksi, papin Jehojadan siaan, olemaan esimiehet Herran huoneessa, ylitse kaikkein mielipuolten ennustajain, panemaan heitä vankiuteen ja jalkapuuhun.
verses.king_james: The Lord hath made thee priest in the stead of Jehoiada the priest, that ye should be officers in the house of the Lord, for every man that is mad, and maketh himself a prophet, that thou shouldest put him in prison, and in the stocks.

verses.latin_vulgate: et nunc quare non increpasti Jeremiam Anathothiten, qui prophetat vobis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה לָ֚מָּה לֹ֣א גָעַ֔רְתָּ בְּיִרְמְיָ֖הוּ הָֽעַנְּתֹתִ֑י הַמִּתְנַבֵּ֖א לָכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now why hast thou not rebuked Jeremiah the Anathothite, who prophesieth to you?
verses.finnish_biblia: Miksi et sinä siis nuhtele Jeremiaa Anatotista, joka teille ennustaa?
verses.king_james: Now therefore why hast thou not reproved Jeremiah of Anathoth, which maketh himself a prophet to you?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia super hoc misit in Babylonem ad nos, dicens : Longum est : ædificate domos, et habitate : et plantate hortos, et comedite fructus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י עַל־כֵּ֞ן שָׁלַ֥ח אֵלֵ֛ינוּ בָּבֶ֥ל לֵאמֹ֖ר אֲרֻכָּ֣ה הִ֑יא בְּנ֤וּ בָתִּים֙ וְשֵׁ֔בוּ וְנִטְע֣וּ גַנּ֔וֹת וְאִכְל֖וּ אֶת־פְּרִיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: For he hath also sent to us in Babylon, saying: It is a long time: build ye houses, and dwell in them: and plant gardens, and eat the fruits of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hän on lähettänyt meidän tykömme Babeliin, ja antanut meille sanoa: vielä nyt pitää oleman aikaa, rakentakaat huoneita ja asukaat niissä, ja istuttakaat puutarhoja, syödäksenne niistä hedelmiä.
verses.king_james: For therefore he sent unto us in Babylon, saying, This captivity is long: build ye houses, and dwell in them; and plant gardens, and eat the fruit of them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Legit ergo Sophonias sacerdos librum istum in auribus Jeremiæ prophetæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֛א צְפַנְיָ֥ה הַכֹּהֵ֖ן אֶת־הַסֵּ֣פֶר הַזֶּ֑ה בְּאׇזְנֵ֖י יִרְמְיָ֥הוּ הַנָּבִֽיא׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: So Sophonias the priest read this letter, in the hearing of Jeremiah the prophet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin pappi Zephania oli lukenut sen kirjoituksen Jeremian prophetan kuullen,
verses.king_james: And Zephaniah the priest read this letter in the ears of Jeremiah the prophet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est verbum Domini ad Jeremiam, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶֽל־יִרְמְיָ֖הוּ לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the word of the Lord came to Jeremiah, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tapahtui Herran sana Jeremialle ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: Then came the word of the Lord unto Jeremiah, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Mitte ad omnem transmigrationem, dicens : Hæc dicit Dominus ad Semeiam Nehelamiten : Pro eo quod prophetavit vobis Semeias, et ego non misi eum, et fecit vos confidere in mendacio,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁלַ֤ח עַל־כׇּל־הַגּוֹלָה֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר כֹּ֚ה אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶל־שְׁמַעְיָ֖ה הַנֶּחֱלָמִ֑י יַ֡עַן אֲשֶׁר֩ נִבָּ֨א לָכֶ֜ם שְׁמַעְיָ֗ה וַֽאֲנִי֙ לֹ֣א שְׁלַחְתִּ֔יו וַיַּבְטַ֥ח אֶתְכֶ֖ם עַל־שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Send to all them of the captivity, saying: Thus saith the Lord to Semeias the Nehelamite: Because Semeias hath prophesied to you, and I sent him not: and hath caused you to trust in a lie:
verses.finnish_biblia: Lähetä kaikkein vankein tykö ja anna heille sanoa: näin sanoo Herra Semajaa vastaan Nehalamista: että Semaja ennustaa teille, ja en kuitenkaan minä ole häntä lähettänyt, ja on tehnyt, että te luotatte valheesen,
verses.king_james: Send to all them of the captivity, saying, Thus saith the Lord concerning Shemaiah the Nehelamite; Because that Shemaiah hath prophesied unto you, and I sent him not, and he caused you to trust in a lie:

verses.latin_vulgate: idcirco hæc dicit Dominus : Ecce ego visitabo super Semeiam Nehelamiten, et super semen ejus : non erit ei vir sedens in medio populi hujus, et non videbit bonum quod ego faciam populo meo, ait Dominus, quia prævaricationem locutus est adversus Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֞ן כֹּֽה־אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה הִנְנִ֨י פֹקֵ֜ד עַל־שְׁמַעְיָ֣ה הַנֶּחֱלָמִי֮ וְעַל־זַרְעוֹ֒ לֹא־יִהְיֶ֨ה ל֜וֹ אִ֣ישׁ ׀ יוֹשֵׁ֣ב ׀ בְּתוֹךְ־הָעָ֣ם הַזֶּ֗ה וְלֹֽא־יִרְאֶ֥ה בַטּ֛וֹב אֲשֶׁר־אֲנִ֥י עֹשֶֽׂה־לְעַמִּ֖י נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה כִּֽי־סָרָ֥ה דִבֶּ֖ר עַל־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore thus saith the Lord: behold I will visit upon Semeias the Nehelamite, and upon his seed: he shall not have a man to sit in the midst of this people, and he shall not see the good that I will do to my people, saith the Lord: because he hath spoken treason against the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden sanoo Herra näin: katso, minä tahdon kostaa Semajalle Nehalamista ja hänen siemenellensä, niin ettei yhdenkään pidä hänen omistansa pysymän tämän kansan seassa, eikä pidä näkemän sitä hyvää, jonka minä tahdon tehdä kansalleni, sanoo Herra; sillä hän on puheellansa kääntänyt heidät pois Herrasta.
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord; Behold, I will punish Shemaiah the Nehelamite, and his seed: he shall not have a man to dwell among this people; neither shall he behold the good that I will do for my people, saith the Lord; because he hath taught rebellion against the Lord.
